text.title: Creating or Updating Claude Code Agents Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the subtask benefit from context isolation OR parallel execution?

branch.question: Is the work primarily knowledge-bound (reusable across sessions)?

conclusion.verdict: use Skill — auto-trigger by keyword; shared context
use Command for manual /invoke, or inline in parent prompt for one-off

branch.question: Does the subtask need interactive user input mid-execution?

conclusion.verdict: reject Agent; restructure to provide all inputs upfront OR run inline in parent
create Agent with minimum tool whitelist + JSON output contract

text.example: isolation=true (parent context shouldn't see full diff) → interactive=false → Agent with Read+Grep+Glob whitelist, JSON output_contract.
